entries.title: Life Field
entries.gist: A big Conway's Game of Life field for birth, survival, gliders, oscillators, and glowing emergence.

entries.title: Two Traditions, One Sky
entries.gist: A sourced Garden Letter for Fixed Stars Field: attention before certainty, and mystery recorded without being solved.

entries.title: Fixed Stars Field
entries.gist: Two sky traditions, one luminous mystery, and controls for Seeing, Compare, Record, and Wonder.

entries.title: Crow Weather
entries.gist: An offering field where trust approaches by wind, shine, and distance.

entries.title: Soil Trace Field
entries.gist: A full browser-native field for soil, rain, lamp, seed, and marks left by hand.

entries.title: Soft Fascination Field
entries.gist: A restorative garden field for light, motion, mystery, return, trace, wander, and stillness.

entries.title: No Receipt Room
entries.gist: A warm room for time without proof: warmth, room, weight, and trace.
